## Meeting Purpose

[Review December/January performance and align on strategic priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Performance:** Organic traffic has fully recovered from a seasonal December dip, now exceeding early-January levels. The new security content cluster is showing promising initial growth.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [**Lead Tracking Unlocked:** Matt will share a Salesforce data export, enabling GrowthX to track content-sourced leads and revenue impact, including a closed deal from a ChatGPT-sourced lead.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** The priority is "exponential growth" in impressions and engaged sessions to build market momentum. This requires diversifying content for user vs. exec audiences and aligning SEO with paid campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [**New LLM Reporting:** GrowthX is building its own LLM visibility tool to replace the unreliable Scrunch. It will use historical prompt data to eliminate the "guess and check" of current tracking methods.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)

## Topics

### Performance Review (Dec 2025–Jan 2026)

  - [**Report Scope:** Katya presented a combined Dec/Jan report to analyze the post-holiday recovery.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Organic Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [Fully recovered from the seasonal December dip, now exceeding early-January levels.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [YoY organic search impressions grew from 232k to 600k.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [**Content Pillars:**](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
      - [The new security cluster shows promising initial growth in sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [**Non-Branded Keywords:**](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - [Clicks and impressions are growing.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - [GrowthX provided a keyword export to Outshine to identify paid opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
      - [ChatGPT traffic share is down, possibly due to upcoming ad launches.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
      - [Gemini traffic is up, likely from its deeper integration into Google's AI responses.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)

### Lead Tracking & Reporting

  - [**Goal:** Connect content to business impact (leads, revenue).](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [**Solution:** Matt will share a Salesforce data export via Coefficient.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [**Data Limitations:**](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [The export pulls from lead records, not merged opportunity tables.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [Opportunity sourcing is last-touch, which can obscure the original content source.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [**Workaround:** GrowthX will use a copy of the Sheet for analysis to avoid breaking the live report.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)

### Strategic Direction

  - [**Primary Goal:** "Exponential growth" in impressions and engaged sessions to build market momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [**Key Initiatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - [**Audience Diversification:** Create user- vs. exec-focused content.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - [**Keyword Expansion:** Research security keywords beyond "zero trust."](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [**Paid/SEO Alignment:** Use the keyword export to identify organic opportunities that can reduce paid spend.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
      - [**Content Calendar:** Build a 1-month+ forward-looking calendar in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
      - [22 articles published in January.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
      - [50 topics pending approval in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [Share the Salesforce data export (Google Sheet) with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [Schedule the strategy meeting with Garish.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
      - [Send the strategic messaging document and CEO kickoff chat transcript to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
      - [Analyze the Salesforce data export to build lead-tracking reports.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [Share a demo of the new LLM visibility tool on the next call.](https://fathom.video/share/t1RtkP6QVdKpFSNL9oFKVMdztnx5nGG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
